//: TypeScript config for the injected Frida agent (src/agent/**). The agent runs inside the target Android process under Frida's GumJS runtime — NOT Node and NOT a browser. So we load only the frida-gum ambient globals (Java, Interceptor, Process, rpc, send, console, setTimeout…) and deliberately exclude DOM and @types/node. esbuild does the actual bundling; tsc here is typecheck-only (noEmit). This config is intentionally absent from tsconfig.node.json / tsconfig.web.json includes so the agent's Frida globals never leak into the app typecheck.
//include: Only src/agent. The agent imports @shared/frida-intel (pulled in transitively + typechecked), but we must NOT compile all of src/shared here — shared/types.ts references NodeJS.* which isn't in the agent's lib/types set.
